title: Bloomington resident sues Duke Energy for electrical fire that damaged house
description:
The lawsuit was filed on June 23 in Monroe County Superior Court by plaintiff Steve Patterson. Duke Energy is the only defendant named in the lawsuit.

title: INDOT awards $84M in Community Crossings grants
description:
The funding will support local road and bridge projects in 147 cities, towns and counties throughout the state.

title: Purdue seeking ‘broad input’ in search for university’s next president
description:
